program: Business English — Desbloqueio para Lideranca em Oncologia
hub_subtitle: Desbloqueio Comunicativo para Liderança em Oncologia Internacional

lesson.menu_desc: Presenting the Einstein oncology network at an international congress (ASCO) -- booth, audience and superlatives -- 31 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 11 -- Presenting at a Congress (ASCO)
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Fernando Varela | Aula 11 -- Presenting at a Congress (ASCO)

listenings.text: Welcome to the ASCO congress in Chicago. Please visit the booths in the main hall. Today, the highlight is the session on advanced cell therapies. The audience is very large this year. This is the best opportunity to meet the leading hospitals worldwide. The next presentation starts soon. Thank you, and enjoy the congress.

Good morning. Thank you for visiting our booth. I am proud to present the Einstein oncology network. We are one of the leading cancer centers in Latin America, and we have the most advanced therapies. Our biggest achievement is our new cell therapy program. This is a great opportunity to share our work with a worldwide audience. Thank you.
